per_episode.task_description: Pick up the brown pinecone keychain with charm and place it in or on the round dark stone bowl
Pick up the sleek slim dark phone with camera and place it in or on the round dark stone bowl
Pick up the transparent glass pepper shaker and place it in or on the round gray ceramic bowl
Pick up the white paper towel and place it in or on the round shallow dish with scrollwork
Pick up the spoon and place it in or on the stainless pot with handles
Pick up the green tool and place it in or on the rustic gray stone bowl
Pick up the curved hunting knife with handle and place it in or on the small blue decorative ceramic bottle
Pick up the digital watch and place it in or on the decorative maroon floral box
Pick up the polished metal butter knife and place it in or on the brown medical case
